info.name: Bonoos API
info.description:
Bonoos API — Postman (kod bilan sinxron).

UMUMIY
• Muvaffaqiyatli JSON: ko‘pincha {"data": ...} (GET /health va Payme webhook — to‘g‘ridan-to‘g‘ri JSON).
• Xato: {"error": "matn"}.
• /api/v1 (Payme dan tashqari): sarlavha x-uuid.
• Himoya: Authorization: Bearer <access_token>.
• JSONda ortiqcha maydonlar 400 (DisallowUnknownFields).

CLIENT phone: 9 raqam, masalan 901234567 (+998 yo‘q).

ADMIN bootstrap: X-Admin-Create-Key + /auth/admin/register.

ENUM: subscription status 0/1/2; payment status 0–3; payment provider 1 payme; notification scope 1 shaxsiy, 2 umumiy.

request.description: Javob: {"data":[...]} — har bir endpoint uchun quyidagi bloklarda aniq yozilgan.
Tashqi provayder. x-uuid yo‘q. Haqiqiy metodlar Payme hujjatiga mos.
Javob data: tokens {access_token, refresh_token, expires_in}, user_id, is_new_user
Bearer: verify-otp access_token. Javob data: tokens
Javob data: id, username, message. 404 agar bootstrap o‘chiq.
data: barcha analytics maydonlari (users, subscriptions, payments 30d, ...).
Query: challenge_id, user_id, is_completed, day_from, day_to, limit, offset. data: {items, total}
multipart: file. Query bucket, prefix. data: url, key, bucket
multipart: files (bir xil nom, bir nechta fayl). data: [Result]
